mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_TAB_PARTITIONS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'FWK_BATCH_HIS'
SELECT PARTITION_NAME FROM USER_TAB_PARTITIONS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'FWK_BATCH_HIS' AND PARTITION_NAME LIKE 'P_%' AND SUBSTR(PARTITION_NAME, 3, 6) < #{cutoffYearMonth} ORDER BY PARTITION_NAME
SELECT NUM_ROWS FROM USER_TAB_PARTITIONS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'FWK_BATCH_HIS' AND PARTITION_NAME = #{partitionName}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_TAB_PARTITIONS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'FWK_BATCH_HIS' AND PARTITION_NAME = #{partitionName}
